sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39496" key="e)piqumo/deipnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθῡμόδειπνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n39496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eager for dinner</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.726a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
